<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Mailer\Bridge\Postmark\Transport; use Symfony\Component\Mime\Header\UnstructuredHeader; final class MessageStreamHeader extends UnstructuredHeader { public function __construct(string $value) { parent::__construct('X-PM-Message-Stream', $value); } }
